error_signature: SHA1 hash generated is incompatible with Netlify
title: Incompatible SHA1 hash for Netlify API
symptom: The SHA1 hash generated by the Expression node does not match the expected format for the Netlify API, leading to error messages during deployment.
applies_when: Using Expression node to generate SHA1 hash
not_this_if: Using a different method to generate SHA1 hash
No errors from the Netlify API
root_cause: The Expression node's method of generating the SHA1 hash may not align with the specific requirements of the Netlify API, resulting in a hash that is slightly different from what Netlify expects.
fix_steps: Add an Edit Fields (Set) node before the HTTP node
Use the JS expression '{{ $json.toJsonString().hash('sha1') }}' to generate the SHA1 hash
Connect the output to the HTTP node for deployment
agent_instruction: Use the specified JS expression in an Edit Fields (Set) node to generate a compatible SHA1 hash for Netlify.
